forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link

register.adminNote: ✓ Your email will be saved as an admin. You can login with these credentials after registration.

description.title: MALTRAINS operations hub
description.p1: The ultimate command center for modern metro fleets. Monitor, manage, and optimize every aspect of your rail network from a single, unified interface.
description.p2: Designed for maximum efficiency and high-stakes reliability.

header.subtitle: Monitor and manage metro operations in real-time

attendance.title: Attendance Management
attendance.name: Name
attendance.deleteConfirmDesc: To delete this staff member, enter their registered email and password to verify.

incidents.title: Report Incident
incidents.description_prompt: Report safety incidents such as fire, harassment, or emergencies.
incidents.formSubtitle: Provide details to help the admin team respond quickly.
incidents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this incident report? This action cannot be undone.
incidents.toastDeletedDesc: The incident report has been permanently removed.
incidents.toastSuccessDesc: Your report has been saved and the admin team has been notified.

dataEntry.title: Data Entry
dataEntry.subtitle: Monitor train operational status and mileage
dataEntry.onlyAdmin: Only administrators can modify data. View-only mode active.

chatbot.title: MALTRAINS AI
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I am MALTRAINS AI. How can I help you with the metro fleet operations today?
chatbot.hi_response: Hi! How can I help you with the MALTRAINS metro fleet operations today?
chatbot.errorDesc: Failed to talk to MALTRAINS AI
chatbot.errorBrain: I'm having trouble connecting to my database brain.
chatbot.noResults: Admin, I searched the database but couldn't find any records matching that specific criteria. Could you try rephrasing?
chatbot.generalSuccess: I've pulled the complete dataset for your request. I found {{count}} relevant train records in the database. I'm ready for your next instruction, Admin.
chatbot.riskResponse: Sir, I've analyzed the fleet health. There are {{count}} trains flagged for risk. The most critical is {{rakeId}} with a score of {{score}}.
chatbot.standbyResponse: Currently, {{count}} trains are in standby. {{rakeId}} is on {{decision}} due to: "{{explanation}}".
chatbot.mileageResponse: The train with the highest operational wear is {{rakeId}}, which has cleared {{mileage}} km. Full fleet mileage is listed below.
chatbot.brandingResponse: I've retrieved information on {{count}} active branding campaigns. For instance, {{rakeId}} is showcasing "{{campaign}}".
chatbot.runningResponse: There are currently {{count}} trains in active operations. {{rakeId}} is on the {{route}} line.
chatbot.searchResponse: I found {{count}} match(es). {{rakeId}} is currently {{status}} on the {{route}} route.
